descFull: Codebase intelligence for TypeScript and JavaScript. Free static layer: unused code, duplication, circular deps, complexity hotspots, architecture boundaries. Optional paid runtime layer: hot-path review and cold-path deletion evidence from real production traffic. Rust-native, sub-second, zero-config framework support.
